Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Or Stay For Inconvenient Forum
Off Calendar May-19-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SHARON B. FUTERMAN, TEL. NO. 1-916-443-4849 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JEFFREY E. LEVINE OF MATHENY SEAR JAIME LLP, TEL. NO. 1-916-978-3434 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
ATTY. LAWRENCE M. GUSLANI OF HAYES SCOTT BONINO & MCLAY LLP, TEL. NO. 1-650-486-2894 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT STATE FARM BY COURT CALL APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The court modified its tentative ruling: Defendants Ace American Insurance Company, PV Holding Corp., and Budget Rent A Car System, Inc.'s motion to dismiss or stay for inconvenient forum is denied as to the request to dismiss this case and granted as to the discretionary stay in this case. For simple judiciary economy and comity, forum non-conveniens does not kick in until the British Columbia rules. The court has authority to stay a case to prevent duplicative proceedings to ensure that the parties are not required to do things in 2 different forums concurrently. This is a discretionary stay outside of forum non-conveniens unless and until the court in British Columbia rules and if the court in British Columbia rules, then it a a forum non-conveniens stay ruled in favor of jurisdiction.
Court to prepare order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk
